posts.text:
QUERIDOS AMIGOS Y HERMANOS HISPANOS,

Si usted tiene familia con el cual no se ha comunicado por un tiempo, PORFAVOR a pesar de cualquier razón por el cual no ha querido comunicarse con ellos, HAZLO PORFAVOR.   Perder un ser querido es sumamente difícil, pero perder uno con el cual se ha perdido el contacto duele muchísimo más.  Si yo supiera que Charo tenia familia que ni sabía si vivía aún, le habría animado a que hable con ellos.  Su hermana hizo este video con fotos que le dimos después de su muerte.  Antes, no más tenían una foto de su juventud.  NO PIERDE COMUNICACIÓN CON LA FAMILIA PORFAVOR.
Tienda latina en Monroe! En la 165 north por Wingstop y Sherwin Williams 🌴

posts.text: Buenos días a todos!  Espero que se encuentre bien.  Le invito a acompañarnos mañana a la iglesia de Cristo en Jackson Street.  La dirección es 1103 Jackson Street en Monroe.  Vamos a reunirnos a las 9:00 para café y donuts y el servicio empezará a las 9:30.  Vamos a continuar nuestro estudio sobre la anciedad y el matrimonio.  A las 12, espero que se quede para el almuerzo.  Espero verle pronto.  Cualquier pregunta que tenga, me puede avisar por enviarme mensaje en facebook o me puede llamar/enviar texto a 501-339-3339.  Que Dios le bendiga ricamente.

¡¡¡NO SE DEJEN LLEVAR POR RUMORES!!!  Estan compartiendo esta misma foto en Dallas, Austin, West Monroe, Monroe ... diciendo ¡Esta la migra en la Walmart aqui!

Ya 4 personas de repente me pasaron esta misma foto esta mañana diciendo que la immi esta en Monroe y West Monroe... Fui a Monroe. No estan. Otros fueron a West Monroe... ¡no estan!

CALMA HERMANOS Y AMIGOS.  CONFIA EN DIOS.

posts.text: Les quiero recomendar a Jolene que trabaja en Hair We Go en el mall.  Fui Ayer solamente a ver si podria hacer cita y me trataron come cliente de hace años, luego luego me atendieron con una sonrisa. Tenia el pelo lleno de canas con raiz negra y el resto del pelo casi anaranjado. Jolene se tomo su tiempo y me dejo el cabello tan suave y muy bonito. Siempre es dificil encontrar a alguien que sepa trabajar con cabello negro. El nivel del servicio Al cliente me sorprendio. Se las recomiendo. Jolene, en Hair We Go, en Pecanland Mall.

A las 9:30, vamos a continuar con nuestro estudio sobre la anciedad y el matrimonio.  ¿le gustaría evitar la anciedad en su matrimonio? Buenas tardes!  Les invito a acompañarnos esta noche para nuestro estudio sobre los ancianos, diáconos, ministros y cristianos.  Vamos a estudiar lo que dice la biblia en cuanto a los requisitos y responsabilidades de todos los miembros de la iglesia biblica.  El estudio empieza a las 7.  Hay clases para todos.  Nos reunimos a 1103 Jackson Street en Monroe.  Cualquier pregunta que tenga, me puede avisar:  501-339-3339.  Espero verles pronto.  Dios les bendiga ricamente.

results.sum: Heartfelt message urging people not to lose contact with family, inspired by the recent death of community member Charo whose family had lost touch with her.
Announcing Medina Market, a Latin store on Highway 165 North in Monroe near Wingstop and Sherwin Williams.
Image-only Medina Market update; staff notes it has been a busy day but they are still open.
Invitation to Sunday Bible study on anxiety and marriage at Church of Christ, 1103 Jackson Street, Monroe — 9am coffee/donuts, 9:30 study, lunch at noon. Contact 501-339-3339.

Michael Strickland debunks viral fake photo claiming ICE is at Walmart in Monroe/West Monroe — personally verified no agents are there; multiple commenters confirm it is a hoax circulating in many cities.
Mentions a Latin store on Highway 165 toward Sterlington in Monroe that offers shipping and other services.
Image-only Medina Market post; commenter asks what time they close.
Invitation to Sunday Bible study on anxiety and marriage at Church of Christ — 9am coffee, 9:30 study. Contact 501-339-3339.
Looking for a certified/licensed electrician and plumber to do work within the City of West Monroe.

New resident looking for a Christian church recommendation; many congregations respond with addresses and service times (Centro Compasion, Pentecostal, Church of Christ, Baptist Mission, St. Paschal).
Strong recommendation for hairstylist Jolene at Hair We Go salon in Pecanland Mall — praised for excellent results on dark/black hair and outstanding customer service.
Selling enchiladas potosinas and natural fruit drinks Saturday July 27 at 300 Lincoln St, West Monroe — delivery available from 10am, order by inbox.
Warning about police checkpoint this weekend — drive carefully.
Asking where to buy fresh ears of corn.
Wingate Hotel at 228 Blanchard St, West Monroe is hiring a maintenance worker — must speak some English, apply in person.
Reminder: Saturday sale of enchiladas potosinas and natural fruit drinks at 300 Lincoln St, West Monroe — delivery from 10am.
Invitation to Sunday Bible study on anxiety and marriage at Church of Christ, 9am coffee, 9:30 study. Contact 501-339-3339.
Selling enchiladas potosinas — order now; commenter places order for 6 portions.
Image-only Medina Market post; commenter asks if they are open on Sundays.
Promoting a September 14 Central American Independence Day celebration with live music — Grupo Respaldo from Los Mochis, Sinaloa.
Centro Compasion church invites people to join this morning at 11am for a talk about God's love — bring a friend.
Looking for someone who can repair a small riding lawn mower.
Asking where to find a Catholic church in Monroe or West Monroe; commenter says Spanish Mass is at 4pm.
Post containing only a hotel website link with no text or context — likely spam.
Looking for someone who can repair a riding lawn mower; commenter provides phone 318-953-4102.
Renting out a room suitable for a couple or single woman — contact via inbox for details.
Selling beef sopes (4 per order) and natural fruit drinks Saturday August 3 at 300 Lincoln St, West Monroe — delivery from 10am, order now.
Gabriel Hernandez shares new Louisiana child car seat laws that took effect today, with an informational image.
Tina Gallegos cancels Saturday food sale event due to health reasons — apologizes to those who had already ordered and says it will be rescheduled.
Invitation to Sunday Bible study on avoiding anxiety in marriage at Church of Christ, 9am coffee/donuts, 9:30 study. Contact 501-339-3339.
Very short post expressing sadness ('Sad!') with no further context or comments.
Medina Market announces new product flavors have arrived.
Chase Turner celebrates 30 attendees at Sunday service and invites all to Wednesday 7pm Bible study and next Sunday service.
Offering prepaid DirectTV and Dish Latino satellite TV service with Spanish and English channels including all soccer leagues — with or without insurance. Call 903-407-7407 or 903-387-7997.
Selling Spanish elastic depilatory wax (no strips needed, natural, biodegradable) — $18 + shipping, ships anywhere in the USA.
Selling Rapunzel Formula organic shampoo for hair growth and to stop hair loss — $24 + shipping, ships anywhere in the USA.
Personal praise for a powerful religious teaching by brother Jorge Lagos about God's Word.
Medina Market announces chamoy (Mexican candy/condiment sauce) is now available.
Medina Market announces pan dulce, bolillos, conchas, and tamales are now available.
Centro Compasion church announces service tonight at 7pm.
Centro Compasion church event — image-only post; comment invites people to 'come for a miracle'.
Invitation to Sunday Bible study concluding the series on anxiety and marriage at Church of Christ, 9am coffee/donuts, 9:30 study. Contact 501-339-3339.
Single letter 'B' posted with no context — meaningless post.
Offering Spanish/English TV package (Univision, Galavision, Telemundo, Disney, Nickelodeon, etc.) — contact 906-205-1957 for pricing and promotions.
Selling Rapunzel Formula organic shampoo for hair growth and to stop hair loss — $24.50 + shipping, ships anywhere in the USA.
Selling Rapunzel Formula organic shampoo for hair growth and to stop hair loss — $24.99 + shipping, ships anywhere in the USA.

Invitation to Wednesday 7pm Bible study on roles of elders, deacons, ministers, and all Christians at Church of Christ, 1103 Jackson Street, Monroe. Contact 501-339-3339.
Image-only post offering an unidentified food or product; commenters express interest and seller says more variety is coming soon.
